phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.
Rome wasn't built, in a day.
phrases.polish: Rzym nie powstał, w jeden dzień.

phrases.english: Glad we met, you and I.
phrases.polish: Cieszę się, że się poznaliśmy, ty i ja.
Wierz w siebie, możesz to zrobić.

phrases.english: Every word, is a step forward.
Don't fear mistakes, learn from them.
phrases.polish: Nie bój się błędów, ucz się na nich.

phrases.english: Little by little, you will grow.

phrases.polish: Zmierz się ze strachem, idź naprzód.

phrases.english: You are stronger, than you think.
Embrace the challenge, you can do it.
You are capable, of great things.
You make things better, you do.
You're one of a kind, really.

phrases.polish: Twój głos się liczy, po polsku.
Ucz się zawsze, rozwijaj się codziennie.

phrases.english: Little by little, you'll get there.
Every word learned, is a step forward.
Don't be afraid, to try something new.
phrases.polish: Nie bój się, próbować nowych rzeczy.

phrases.english: Your effort, will bring you results.

phrases.polish: Ucz się polskiego, dzień po dniu.

phrases.english: Plant a good seed, watch it grow.
phrases.polish: Zasadź dobre ziarno, patrz jak rośnie.

phrases.english: A gentle word, like morning dew.
Share your sunshine, warm the day.
Listen close, hear the heart's song.
A helping hand, a strong anchor.
Like a sturdy oak, our friendship grows.
You're my sunshine, on cloudy days.
phrases.polish: Jesteś moim słońcem, w dni szare.

phrases.english: A shared laugh, is the best medicine.
Your kindness, shines like a beacon.
Your smile, a sunbeam, warms the day.
phrases.polish: Twój uśmiech, promyk słońca, grzeje dzień.

phrases.english: Let joy, like a bird, take flight.
phrases.polish: Pozwól radości, jak ptakowi, wzbić się.

phrases.english: Find the sparkle, in small moments.
A happy heart, sings its own song.
Taste the sweetness, of this breath.
Your next step, is already blooming.
This moment, is building something new.
Your smile, a sunrise, breaks the clouds.
phrases.polish: Twój uśmiech, wschód słońca, rozprasza chmury.

phrases.english: Taste the moment, before it flies.
The seed you planted, will grow.
A gentle breeze, can move mountains.
This quiet moment, holds much power.
phrases.polish: Ta cicha chwila, ma wielką moc.

phrases.english: Let your spark, ignite the way.
Stand tall, like an old tree.
Even a tiny seed, can grow tall.
The river carves stone, slowly, patiently.
A difficult path,  builds strong legs.
Don't fear the stumble,  learn to rise.
phrases.polish: Nie bój się potknięcia, ucz się wstawać.

phrases.english: Each sunrise,  brings a new effort.
Find the calm, within the hum.
Find the light, in the dark.
Your next step, opens a new door.
phrases.polish: Twój następny krok, otwiera nowe drzwi.

phrases.english: The current is pulling you forward.
Plant a seed, watch it grow.
Listen to the quiet hum, of progress.
Even a strong wind, eventually calms.
phrases.polish: Nawet silny wiatr, w końcu cichnie.

phrases.english: A single seed, grows a forest.
The path clears, with each step.
phrases.polish: Ścieżka się rozjaśnia, z każdym krokiem.

phrases.english: Like a warm mug, you brighten my day.
phrases.polish: Jak ciepły kubek, rozjaśniasz mój dzień.

phrases.english: You're my favorite kind of quiet.
With you, even Mondays feel like sunshine.
phrases.polish: Z tobą, nawet poniedziałki czują się jak słońce.

phrases.english: You’re the calm in my everyday storm.
phrases.polish: Jesteś spokojem w mojej codziennej burzy.

phrases.english: Paint your world, with vibrant colors.
Let ideas bloom, like unexpected flowers.
phrases.polish: Niech pomysły kwitną, jak niespodziewane kwiaty.

phrases.english: Your thoughts, are tiny seeds, for big forests.
phrases.polish: Twoje myśli, to małe nasiona, dla wielkich lasów.

phrases.english: Build bridges, with what you imagine.
phrases.polish: Buduj mosty, tym co sobie wyobrazisz.

phrases.english: Find patterns, in the chaos around.
Each dawn, a fresh chance, shine bright.
phrases.polish: Każdy świt, nowa szansa, świeć jasno.

phrases.english: The smallest seed, holds a forest.
Listen to your heart, it knows the way.
Find your own rhythm, dance freely.
A quiet moment, a full heart.
Kindness blooms, thank you for it.
Find your calm, moment by moment.
Unfurl your spirit, like a fern.
Like a quiet river, our love flows, gently.
phrases.polish: Jak cicha rzeka, nasza miłość płynie, łagodnie.

phrases.english: Your smile, my sunbeam, on a cloudy day.
phrases.polish: Twój uśmiech, moje słońce, w pochmurny dzień.

phrases.english: In your eyes, I find my calm harbor.
phrases.polish: W twoich oczach, znajduję mój spokojny port.

phrases.english: Our shared silence, speaks volumes, my dear.
phrases.polish: Nasza wspólna cisza, mówi wiele, mój drogi.

phrases.english: You are the missing piece, of my heart's puzzle.
phrases.polish: Jesteś brakującym kawałkiem, mojej serca łamigłówki.

phrases.english: Your inner compass, always points true.
phrases.polish: Twój wewnętrzny kompas, zawsze wskazuje drogę.

phrases.english: Plant seeds of kindness, watch them grow.
phrases.polish: Zasiej nasiona dobroci, obserwuj jak rosną.

phrases.english: Listen to the quiet wisdom, within you.
Find joy, in the small things.
Find joy, in the quiet moments.
A warm cup, a happy heart.
Find your quiet center, like a deep lake.
phrases.polish: Znajdź swój cichy środek, jak głębokie jezioro.

phrases.english: Let thoughts flow, like a gentle stream.
phrases.polish: Pozwól myślom płynąć, jak łagodny strumień.

phrases.english: Breathe in stillness, exhale the hurry.
Your peace is an inner garden, tend it.
phrases.polish: Twój spokój to wewnętrzny ogród, pielęgnuj go.

phrases.english: Listen to the silence, it speaks volumes.
When tired, find a new path.
The wind shifts, adjust your sails.
A quiet joy, like morning dew.
Find laughter, in the small things.
Let your heart, hum a happy tune.
phrases.polish: Niech serce twe, nuci szczęśliwą melodię.

phrases.english: A moment of peace, a gentle breath.
Like a warm sunbeam, find your joy.
phrases.polish: Jak ciepły promyk, odnajdź swoją radość.

phrases.english: Sip the small moments, they taste sweet.
Your laughter, a bright, unexpected song.
Let kindness bloom, like wild flowers.
phrases.polish: Pozwól dobroci zakwitnąć, jak polne kwiaty.

phrases.english: A clear sky, a clear happy heart.
Find your calm, in the storm.
Root yourself, like an old tree.
Observe the ebb, and the flow.
The right word, opens many doors.
Each lesson, plants a new seed.
Your Polish grows, with every try.
phrases.polish: Twój polski rośnie, z każdą próbą.

phrases.english: Discover new sounds, discover new worlds.
phrases.polish: Odkrywaj nowe dźwięki, odkrywaj nowe światy.
Nasze ścieżki, jak rzeki, łączą się.

phrases.english: Let your ideas, bloom like wildflowers.
phrases.polish: Niech Twoje pomysły, kwitną jak dzikie kwiaty.

phrases.english: Paint your day, with vibrant thoughts.
Your imagination, is a hidden treasure.
Build new worlds, with words and color.
phrases.polish: Buduj nowe światy, słowami i kolorem.

phrases.english: Listen to the whisper, of invention.

phrases.polish: Twoja polska przygoda, zaczyna się teraz.

phrases.english: Unlock new words, like a hidden treasure.
phrases.polish: Odkrywaj nowe słowa, jak ukryty skarb.

phrases.english: Each lesson learned, builds a stronger bridge.
Listen closely, the language whispers secrets.
From simple sounds, great conversations grow.
phrases.polish: Z prostych dźwięków, rodzą się rozmowy.

phrases.english: With you, even rain feels like sun.
phrases.polish: Z tobą, nawet deszcz czuje się jak słońce.

phrases.english: My heart, beats only for you.
phrases.polish: Moje serce, bije tylko dla ciebie.

phrases.english: Like a sturdy oak, stand tall.
Build your path, stone by stone.
phrases.polish: Buduj swoją ścieżkę, kamień po kamieniu.

phrases.english: You are the sculptor, of your days.
Even a flicker, can light the way.
Stand tall, like a mountain, unmoving.
The seed of strength, is patience.
Face the storm, with steady hands.
phrases.polish: Zmierz się z burzą, ze spokojnymi rękami.

phrases.english: A brave heart, finds its own rhythm.
The smallest light, shines brightest, in darkness.
phrases.polish: Najmniejsze światło, jaśniej świeci, w ciemności.

phrases.english: A new seed, waits for rain, and sun.
phrases.polish: Nowe ziarno, czeka deszczu, i słońca.

phrases.english: Today's quiet moment, becomes tomorrow's strength.
phrases.polish: Dzisiejsza cisza, stanie się jutrzejszą siłą.

phrases.english: Even a pebble, can start, a ripple.
The song in your heart, will find its rhythm.
phrases.polish: Pieśń w twym sercu, znajdzie swój rytm.

phrases.english: The river finds its way, slowly.
Even a strong wind, has to rest.
Let the seed sprout, in its own time.
phrases.polish: Niech nasionko wykiełkuje, w swoim czasie.

phrases.english: This too, will pass like clouds.
Each small success, is a seed, for tomorrow.
phrases.polish: Każdy mały sukces, to ziarno, na jutro.

phrases.english: Even a slow river, carves stone, eventually.
phrases.polish: Nawet wolna rzeka, rzeźbi skałę, w końcu.

phrases.english: Don't stop for the detours, just adjust your map.
phrases.polish: Nie zatrzymuj się na objazdach, tylko zmień mapę.

phrases.english: Your effort today, builds the path, for your feet.
phrases.polish: Twój dzisiejszy wysiłek, buduje ścieżkę, dla stóp.

phrases.english: When the fog lifts, you'll see, how far you've sailed.
phrases.polish: Gdy mgła opadnie, zobaczysz, jak daleko żeglowałeś.

phrases.english: The puzzle pieces, fit together now.
Your effort, builds a strong bridge.
Each day, a new bloom opens.
See the light, beyond the fog.
This moment, is your planting ground.
phrases.polish: Ta chwila, to twoja ziemia do sadzenia.

phrases.english: In your eyes, I see home.
A kind word, like a warm hug.
See the good, around you, always.
Find the sun, even on cloudy days.
phrases.polish: Znajdź słońce, nawet w pochmurne dni.

phrases.english: The path unfolds, one step at a time.
phrases.polish: Ścieżka się odkrywa, krok po kroku.

phrases.english: Listen to the quiet whispers, of your heart.
Build a bridge, to your future.
Let your spirit, be your compass.
